_comments.about: Code Review Assistant control panel. Everything the pipeline reads at runtime lives here or under resources/ (knowledge_base/, prompts/). Connection/secret settings stay in backend/.env.
_comments.categories: Review dimensions every report is organized around; must match category_folders values.
_comments.category_folders: Maps a knowledge_base/ subfolder name -> canonical category label.
_comments.chunking.section_heading: Markdown heading prefix that starts a new knowledge-base chunk.
_comments.embedding.max_input_chars: Max characters sent to the embedding model per call; guards the model's context window (nomic-embed-text = 2048 tokens).
_comments.retrieval: repository_top_k = standards for a whole-repo query; module_top_k = standards per module; category_overfetch = over-fetch multiplier when filtering by category.
_comments.review: Two-phase code review. max_file_chars = per-file source cap sent to the LLM; max_module_chars = total source cap per module; max_files_per_module = file count cap per module.
_comments.modules: Logical module grouping for hierarchical retrieval. Each file is assigned to the FIRST module whose keywords match a whole word in its path. 'categories' biases KB retrieval. The final 'general' entry (empty keywords) is the catch-all and must stay last.
